description: Clean a field-service appointments export by standardizing timestamps, normalizing technician and service-line labels, reviewing imputed values, resolving risky duplicate conflicts, and publishing an audited service scheduling table.

validation_rules.required_fields_present: All required field-service scheduling fields are populated.
validation_rules.schema_matches: The cleaned table matches the published service scheduling schema.
validation_rules.timestamps_canonical: Appointment and update timestamps are canonical ISO values.
validation_rules.technician_assignments_valid: Technician fields are populated or intentionally reviewed placeholders.
